slides.title: Instant Responses
slides.body: She's always here. Real conversations, anytime you need them.

slides.title: Voice Calls
slides.body: Hear her voice. Feel the connection with live audio calls.

slides.title: Deeply Personal
slides.body: Tell her your interests. She remembers everything about you.

slides.title: Premium Companions
slides.body: Unlock exclusive characters crafted for a premium experience.

settings.deleteMessage: This will sign you out and reset all conversations. This cannot be undone.

paywall.legal: Subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the renewal date. Manage in Google Play → Subscriptions.
